measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.name: total_capacity_kw
measures.comment: Sum of all charging station capacities in kilowatts.

measures.name: average_capacity_per_plug
measures.comment: Average charging capacity per plug across all stations.

measures.name: total_number_of_plugs
measures.comment: Total count of charging plugs across all stations.

measures.name: distinct_operator_count
measures.comment: Number of unique charging station operators.

datasets.name: 8b4b7725
queryLines:
SELECT
  `Operator`,
  AVG(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS avg_total_capacity
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  `Operator`

datasets.name: 8b82ff2f
queryLines:
SELECT
  MAX(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS max_total_station_capacity_kw
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data

datasets.name: ed0507e6
queryLines:
SELECT
  SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) / SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS avg_capacity_per_plug
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data

datasets.name: 45b86819
datasets.displayName: Council With Fewest Electric Vehicle Stations
queryLines:
SELECT council, COUNT(council) AS council_count
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY council
ORDER BY council_count ASC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: d1bdeced
datasets.displayName: Top Three Councils for Electric Vehicle Stations
queryLines:
SELECT council, COUNT(council) AS council_count
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY council
ORDER BY council_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: 2281761b
datasets.displayName: Top 3 council with most AC chargers
queryLines:
SELECT
  council,
  COUNT(*) AS ac_charger_count
FROM
  ev_cleaned_data
WHERE
  charger_type = 'AC'
GROUP BY
  council
ORDER BY
  ac_charger_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: f5d9d6c6
datasets.displayName: Top 3 council with most AC chargers
queryLines:
SELECT
  council,
  COUNT(*) AS dc_charger_count
FROM
  ev_cleaned_data
WHERE
  charger_type = 'DC'
GROUP BY
  council
ORDER BY
  dc_charger_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: 889ab7fc
queryLines:
SELECT
  Council,
  SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_plugs
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  Council
ORDER BY
  total_plugs DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 193b3b6b
queryLines:
SELECT
  Council,
  SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_plugs
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  Council
ORDER BY
  total_plugs ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: f845aed9
datasets.displayName: List of Council with Total Plugs
queryLines:
-- Total Plugs by Council
SELECT
  Council,
  SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_capacity
FROM
  ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  Council
ORDER BY
  Council;

datasets.name: 4c2d05a0
datasets.displayName: List of Council by Total Capacity
queryLines:
-- Total Capacity (kW) by Council
SELECT
  Council,
  SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS total_capacity_kw
FROM
  ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  Council
ORDER BY
  Council;

datasets.name: f2c4bbd8
datasets.displayName: Top 3 companies with most EV Stations
queryLines:
SELECT Operator, COUNT(*) AS ev_charger_count
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY Operator
ORDER BY ev_charger_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: 31f44440
datasets.displayName: Top 3 companies with least EV Stations
queryLines:
SELECT Operator, COUNT(*) AS ev_charger_count
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY Operator
ORDER BY ev_charger_count ASC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: e64d4ab3
datasets.displayName: Top 3 Operators with Most AC Chargers
queryLines:
SELECT
  Operator,
  COUNT(*) AS ac_charger_count
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
WHERE
  Charger_Type = 'AC'
GROUP BY
  Operator
ORDER BY
  ac_charger_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: d7f236eb
datasets.displayName: Top 3 Operators with Most DC chargers
queryLines:
SELECT
  Operator,
  COUNT(*) AS ac_charger_count
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
WHERE
  Charger_Type = 'DC'
GROUP BY
  Operator
ORDER BY
  ac_charger_count DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: a8d39157
datasets.displayName: List of operators by Total Plugs
queryLines:
SELECT
  Operator,
  SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_plugs
FROM
  ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  Operator
ORDER BY
  total_plugs DESC

datasets.name: dad679ae
queryLines:
SELECT Operator,
       SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS total_capacity_kw
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY Operator
ORDER BY total_capacity_kw DESC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: 82f8ccc2
queryLines:
SELECT Operator,
       SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS total_capacity_kw
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY Operator
ORDER BY total_capacity_kw ASC
LIMIT 3

datasets.name: a166c9c6
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM ev_cleaned_data
ORDER BY `Total Plugs` DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 60b7691d
queryLines:
SELECT *
FROM ev_cleaned_data
ORDER BY `Total Plugs` ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: 41ce1cd2
datasets.displayName: Post Code with most Plugs Available
queryLines:
SELECT `Post Code`, SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_plugs
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY `Post Code`
ORDER BY total_plugs DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: fd92eeac
queryLines:
SELECT `Post Code`, SUM(`Total Plugs`) AS total_plugs
FROM ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY `Post Code`
ORDER BY total_plugs ASC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: a7c470b6
queryLines:
SELECT
  `Post Code`,
  SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS total_capacity_kw
FROM
  workspace.default.ev_cleaned_data
GROUP BY
  `Post Code`
ORDER BY

datasets.name: 6b5c46d1
queryLines:
SELECT
  `Post Code`,
  SUM(`Total Capacity(kW)`) AS total_capacity_kw
